contracts.name: focusa_scratch
contracts.label: Scratchpad
contracts.purpose: Write working notes to /tmp/pi-scratch/ — agent's notebook, no Focus State. Transfer crystallized decision to focusa_decide when done.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_decide
contracts.label: Record Decision
contracts.purpose: Record a crystallized architectural decision in Focus State. Use focusa_scratch for working notes first. Decisions are ONE sentence (<=280 chars) — architectural choices only, not task lists.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_constraint
contracts.label: Record Constraint
contracts.purpose: Record a DISCOVERED REQUIREMENT in Focus State. Constraints are hard boundaries from environment/architecture — NOT self-imposed tasks. Max 200 chars.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_failure
contracts.label: Record Failure
contracts.purpose: Record a specific failure with diagnosis in Focus State. Must identify WHAT failed and WHY (or suspected why). Max 300 chars.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_intent
contracts.label: Set Intent
contracts.purpose: Set the frame intent — what this session is trying to achieve (1-3 sentences, max 500 chars).
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_current_focus
contracts.label: Set Current Focus
contracts.purpose: Update current focus — what you are actively working on right now (1-3 sentences, max 300 chars).
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_next_step
contracts.label: Record Next Step
contracts.purpose: Record what you plan to do next (max 160 chars).
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_open_question
contracts.label: Record Open Question
contracts.purpose: Record an open question that needs to be answered (max 200 chars).
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_recent_result
contracts.label: Record Recent Result
contracts.purpose: Record a completed result, output, or reference (max 300 chars).
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_note
contracts.label: Record Note
contracts.purpose: Miscellaneous note (max 200 chars). Bounded at 20, oldest decay first.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_work_loop_writer_status
contracts.label: Work Loop Writer Status
contracts.purpose: Read current work-loop writer ownership and mutation preflight guidance without mutating state.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_work_loop_status
contracts.label: Work Loop Status
contracts.purpose: Get current continuous work-loop state and budgets.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_work_loop_control
contracts.label: Work Loop Control
contracts.purpose: Control continuous work loop: on, pause, resume, stop.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_work_loop_context
contracts.label: Work Loop Context
contracts.purpose: Update continuation decision context (current ask/scope/steering).
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_work_loop_checkpoint
contracts.label: Work Loop Checkpoint
contracts.purpose: Create a manual continuous-loop checkpoint.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_work_loop_select_next
contracts.label: Work Loop Select Next
contracts.purpose: Ask daemon to defer blocked work and select next ready work item.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_state_hygiene_doctor
contracts.label: Focus State Hygiene Doctor
contracts.purpose: Diagnose stale or duplicate Focus State signals without mutating state.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_state_hygiene_plan
contracts.label: Focus State Hygiene Plan
contracts.purpose: Create a proposal-style hygiene plan; does not mutate Focus State.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_state_hygiene_apply
contracts.label: Focus State Hygiene Apply
contracts.purpose: Approval-safe hygiene apply placeholder; requires approved=true and never deletes silently.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_tool_doctor
contracts.label: Focusa Tool Doctor
contracts.purpose: Diagnose Focusa tool-suite readiness, active Workpoint continuity, daemon health, and likely next repair action.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_active_object_resolve
contracts.label: Focusa Active Object Resolve
contracts.purpose: Resolve likely active object references from the current Workpoint and optional hint without inventing canonical refs.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_evidence_capture
contracts.label: Focusa Evidence Capture
contracts.purpose: Capture a bounded evidence ref/result and optionally link it to the active Workpoint.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_workpoint_checkpoint
contracts.label: Workpoint Checkpoint
contracts.purpose: Create a typed Focusa Workpoint checkpoint before compaction, resume, context overflow, model switch, or risky continuation. Use this instead of trusting raw transcript memory; Focusa becomes the canonical continuation source and returns an explicit next-step hint.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_workpoint_link_evidence
contracts.label: Workpoint Link Evidence
contracts.purpose: Attach a stable evidence reference or verification result to the active canonical Workpoint.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_workpoint_resume
contracts.label: Workpoint Resume
contracts.purpose: Fetch the active Focusa WorkpointResumePacket after compaction, resume, context overflow, model switch, or uncertainty. Use this instead of guessing from transcript tail; output includes canonical/degraded status, warnings, and the exact next action.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_tree_head
contracts.label: Tree Head
contracts.purpose: Best safe starting point for lineage work. Use first when you need current branch/head context before path, snapshot, diff, or restore work.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_tree_path
contracts.label: Tree Path
contracts.purpose: Safe ancestry lookup. Use when branch position or lineage depth matters and you do not want to infer it from prior turns.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_tree_snapshot_state
contracts.label: Tree Snapshot State
contracts.purpose: Create a recoverable checkpoint before risky work or comparisons. Best write tool for saving current state with a reason.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_tree_restore_state
contracts.label: Tree Restore State
contracts.purpose: Restore a saved checkpoint when you need rollback or exact/merge recovery. State-changing tool.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_tree_diff_context
contracts.label: Tree Diff Context
contracts.purpose: Best safe compare tool for snapshots. Use this instead of guessing what changed across checkpoints.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_metacog_capture
contracts.label: Metacog Capture
contracts.purpose: Store a reusable learning signal so future reasoning can retrieve it instead of rediscovering the same lesson.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_metacog_retrieve
contracts.label: Metacog Retrieve
contracts.purpose: Best safe search tool for past learning signals relevant to the current ask. Use this before planning or reflection.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_metacog_reflect
contracts.label: Metacog Reflect
contracts.purpose: Generate reusable hypotheses and strategy updates from recent turns when you need learning from past outcomes.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_metacog_plan_adjust
contracts.label: Metacog Plan Adjust
contracts.purpose: Turn a reflection into a tracked adjustment artifact that can later be evaluated for real improvement.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_metacog_evaluate_outcome
contracts.label: Metacog Evaluate Outcome
contracts.purpose: Judge whether an adjustment improved results and whether the learning should be promoted.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_tree_recent_snapshots
contracts.label: Tree Recent Snapshots
contracts.purpose: Best safe helper for finding recent snapshot ids. Use this before diff or restore when you do not already know the right snapshot id.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_tree_snapshot_compare_latest
contracts.label: Tree Snapshot Compare Latest
contracts.purpose: Create a fresh snapshot and compare it to the latest prior snapshot in one move. Best tool when you want checkpoint + diff without manual id hunting.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_metacog_recent_reflections
contracts.label: Metacog Recent Reflections
contracts.purpose: Best safe helper for finding recent reflection ids and update sets before adjust or promote work.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_metacog_recent_adjustments
contracts.label: Metacog Recent Adjustments
contracts.purpose: Best safe helper for finding recent adjustment ids before evaluation or promotion decisions.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_metacog_loop_run
contracts.label: Metacog Loop Run
contracts.purpose: Run capture -> retrieve -> reflect -> adjust -> evaluate in one move. Best composite tool when you want learning workflow compression instead of manual chaining.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_metacog_doctor
contracts.label: Metacog Doctor
contracts.purpose: Diagnose signal quality and retrieval usefulness in one move. Best safe diagnostic tool when deciding whether more capture or reflection work is needed.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_lineage_tree
contracts.label: Lineage Tree
contracts.purpose: Fetch Focusa lineage tree for /tree-aware reasoning and LI addon workflows.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available

contracts.name: focusa_li_tree_extract
contracts.label: LI Tree Extract
contracts.purpose: Extract decision/constraint/risk signals and reflection trigger from lineage tree for metacognitive compounding.
contracts.live_check: contract_static plus focusa_tool_doctor runtime checks when daemon is available
